author: himanshudongre
title: TTT and GPTQ Are Fundamentally Incompatible
description: Evidence from 4 independent configurations showing GPTQ's compensatory weight structure is destroyed by SGD-based test-time training, making TTT and GPTQ mutually exclusive strategies.
key_finding: SGD TTT gives -0.0165 BPB on simple int6 but -0.0001 to +0.030 on GPTQ
